description_long: This skateboard features a well-worn wooden deck with a distinctive graphic design in the center, flanked by two dark grip tape sections at the nose and tail. The deck has a classic concave shape, with visible wear and scuff marks indicating frequent use. The wheels are bright orange and appear to be made of polyurethane, attached to metal trucks that are partially visible beneath the deck. The underside of the deck shows a faded, colorful illustration, possibly hand-drawn, with a mix of abstract and cartoonish elements. The overall appearance suggests a skateboard designed for street or park use, with a sturdy build and functional components. The object exudes a sense of urban authenticity, likely belonging to an experienced skater.
description: A well-used skateboard with a wooden deck, dark grip tape, bright orange wheels, and a faded central graphic. The board shows signs of heavy use and urban character.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, orange wheels, and the worn deck with visible grip tape and central graphic.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose shape, grip tape coverage, and the width of the deck with orange wheels peeking out.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the deck's curvature, grip tape, and wheel placement.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail shape, grip tape, and the board's width, with the trucks and wheels partially visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a central, faded graphic with abstract and cartoonish motifs, including a red circular element and black linework, set against a white background. The design is surrounded by worn black grip tape at both ends.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, small street wheels, bright orange, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver metal trucks, top-mounted, partially visible, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape at the nose and tail, with a large central section left uncovered for the deck graphic; no visible patterns or text
